description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a gently curved seat and backrest made from horizontal wooden slats. The wood is light in color, likely treated for weather resistance, and the slats are evenly spaced for both comfort and drainage. The bench is supported by two sturdy, black metal legs with a slightly angular, industrial design, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The backrest is integrated smoothly into the seat, offering ergonomic support without any armrests. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for public parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas. The materials and design suggest durability and ease of maintenance in high-traffic outdoor environments.
description: A modern, light wood slat bench with a curved seat and backrest, supported by black metal legs and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the bench, highlighting the curved seat and backrest with horizontal wooden slats and black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the ergonomic curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the angular design of the metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the wooden slats and the supporting metal frame, emphasizing the bench's sturdy construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the continuous curve of the seat and backrest, and the profile of the metal legs.
